Only people who prove who they are can p: Only people who prove who they are with Yivi can join a meeting. This is a demo — try it out for your business meeting, (medical) consult, or oral exam.
Participants in IRMA-meet video calls ne: Participants in Yivi Meet video calls prove who they are by disclosing relevant information (like their name and email address) via the Yivi app before they can enter a meeting.
Prove who you are with IRMA: Prove who you are with Yivi
You can prove who you are via <a href=\": You can prove who you are via Yivi. It is a freely available open source identity app — a digital wallet on your phone for personal data. This data is stored only on your phone, nowhere else. You control where you disclose it.
All IRMA-meet users need to have the IRM: All Yivi Meet users need the Yivi app on their phone with the relevant personal data loaded. Which data is required depends on the type of meeting.
At this early stage, there is only one t: This demo uses your email address and name from the Yivi app. Your name can come from the Dutch civil registry (BRP) or from your LinkedIn profile.
The host initiates a new meeting on <a h: The host starts a new meeting on this website and identifies themselves via the Yivi app.
When a participant clicks on the link (s: When a participant clicks the link they are asked to prove who they are via the Yivi app.
A limited version of IRMA-meet is freely: Yivi Meet is a demo powered by BigBlueButton (free tier, hosted by Blindside Networks). The following limitations apply:
the host reveals his/her name and email: the host and participants each disclose their name and email address via Yivi
the meeting link remains valid for at mo: meeting links are valid for at most 24 hours
participants also need to disclose their: at most 25 participants per meeting, including the host
no BigBlueButton control options are ava: recordings are retained by Blindside Networks for up to 7 days and are not downloadable
IRMA-meet video calls are protected in t: Yivi Meet video calls are protected in two ways.
Hosts and participants in IRMA-meet are: Hosts and participants in Yivi Meet are authenticated via Yivi. The types of attributes and their trustworthiness may differ per meeting type.
IRMA-meet does not offer end-to-end encr: Yivi Meet does not offer end-to-end encryption between hosts and participants.
The free version of IRMA-meet is open so: Yivi Meet is open source. You can find the source code and documentation on GitHub.
Feel free to contribute or set up your o: Feel free to contribute or deploy your own instance.
Visit the <a href=\"https://www.irma.app: Visit yivi.app to learn more about the Yivi app, and the Privacy by Design Foundation for background information.
Please authenticate with IRMA before ent: Please authenticate with Yivi before entering the meeting.
Not sure which meeting type is right for:
Not sure which meeting type is right for you?
Find out more below.
Video meetings with up to six participan: Video meetings with up to 25 participants can be hosted by anyone, globally.
The host proves who they are with the IR: The host proves who they are with the Yivi app, sets up the meeting and sends the link to all participants. To enter the meeting, both host and participants disclose their email address and name via Yivi.
Academics in the Netherlands can use IRM: Academics in the Netherlands can use Yivi Meet for one-on-one oral exams via video, with verified identity of the student.
The teacher proves that they are a teach: The teacher proves they are a teacher with the Yivi app, sets up the meeting and sends the link to the student. The student proves who they are with Yivi before entering the exam. The teacher then knows for sure that the right student is present.
For video exams, both the teacher and th: For video exams, both the teacher and the student need the academic personal data from SURFconext in their Yivi app.
Doctors and other medical professionals: Doctors and other medical professionals in the Netherlands can use Yivi Meet for confidential medical video consults with patients.
The medical professional proves that the: The medical professional proves they are registered with the Yivi app, sets up the meeting and sends the link to the patient. The patient proves who they are with Yivi before entering the consult. The medical professional then knows for sure who the patient is.
To set up a medical consult, the medical: To set up a medical consult, the medical professional needs their medical registration number (AGB-code) in their Yivi app. Patients need their name, date of birth and BSN from the national civil registry (BRP) in their Yivi app.
demo_notice_text: This is a demonstration of Yivi-authenticated video meetings. Sessions are limited to 60 minutes and 25 participants.
Yivi Meet does not record or store meeti: Yivi Meet does not record or store meeting content (video, audio, chat, screen shares). Personal data disclosed via Yivi during authentication is used only to create the meeting session and is not retained after the meeting ends.
privacy_data_controller: Yivi Meet is a demonstration service offered by the Privacy by Design Foundation to show what is possible with Yivi-based authentication. The video infrastructure is provided by BigBlueButton, hosted by Blindside Networks.
privacy_connections_encrypted: Connections between participants and the BigBlueButton server are encrypted.
privacy_minimal_data: Yivi Meet does not record or store meeting content (video, audio, chat, screen shares). Personal data disclosed via Yivi during authentication is used only to create the meeting session and is not retained after the meeting ends.
privacy_policy_changes: Technical changes may lead to updates of this privacy policy. The Privacy by Design Foundation will publish any changes on this website.
privacy_contact: For questions about this demo service, please contact the Privacy by Design Foundation. For complaints about data processing you can also contact the Dutch Data Protection Authority (Autoriteit Persoonsgegevens).
about_service_description: Yivi Meet is a demonstration of authenticated video meetings, built on the open source video platform BigBlueButton (hosted by Blindside Networks). It was developed by the Privacy by Design Foundation with support from SIDNfonds.
consent_student_data: I consent to my student's name and email address being used to verify their identity for this meeting.
consent_patient_data: I consent to my patient's personal data being used to verify their identity for this meeting.
privacy_bbb_retention: Recordings are stored by BigBlueButton (Blindside Networks) for up to 7 days and are not downloadable.
